overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a Tarnished character walking across the ruined Ellac Greatbridge toward Stormveil Castle. The scene features dark fantasy gothic architecture, scattered debris and wooden barricades, with the massive golden Erdtree glowing in the overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined greatbridge approach with scattered debris

events.description: game location text 'Ellac Greatbridge' appears and fades in the center of screen

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily across the stone bridge toward the distant castle

entered.detail: massive golden luminous tree towering above the castle in the distance
large gothic castle with multiple towers silhouetted against the golden sky
weathered cobblestone bridge surface with cracks and scattered debris
broken wooden planks and beams littering the bridge walkway
derelict wooden cart wheel lying on its side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on the Ellac Greatbridge with the player character walking toward Stormveil Castle. The massive golden Erdtree dominates the center background while scattered wooden debris and a broken cart wheel lie across the cobblestone path. At 8 seconds, the location text 'Ellac Greatbridge' appears, confirming the setting.

agents.ego_description: continues walking steadily across the bridge passing black banners on poles

entered.detail: tall wooden poles with tattered black banners fluttering in the wind
crude wooden fence barriers lining the edge of the bridge
large cut stone blocks scattered across the bridge surface

segments.scene_description: The character progresses along the mid-section of the bridge, passing black banner poles on the left and wooden barricades on the right. Stormveil Castle grows larger in the right frame as the character approaches, and the density of debris increases slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: densely cluttered bridge with spike barricades

events.description: bridge passage becomes densely cluttered with wooden spike barricades on both sides

agents.ego_description: navigating through the densely debris-filled section approaching the castle entrance

entered.detail: thick accumulation of broken planks, beams, and rubble blocking parts of the path
sharpened wooden stakes and spikes forming defensive barriers
sharpened wooden stakes and spikes forming defensive barriers
large piles of stone rubble and broken masonry

segments.scene_description: The final section of the bridge becomes increasingly cluttered with dense wooden debris and sharp spike barricades lining both sides, creating a narrow passage. Stormveil Castle now looms large on the right as the character approaches the end of the bridge, navigating through the defensive obstacles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward progression across the ruined Ellac Greatbridge, moving from an open cobblestone path toward the looming fortifications of Stormveil Castle. It begins with the player character walking past scattered wooden debris and a broken cart wheel, while the massive golden Erdtree dominates the overcast horizon. As the character advances, the path is framed by black banner poles and wooden barricades, with the silhouette of the castle gradually expanding in the right of the frame. The scene then shifts into a more claustrophobic environment as the bridge becomes increasingly cluttered with dense debris and sharp spike barricades. Finally, the camera navigates through this narrow, defensive passage as the castle looms large, marking the end of the bridge's crossing.
